compute.cost_note: network-bound; one PDF download + text-layer extraction per URL

do_not_use_when: the URLs are Zenodo/Figshare record pages rather than direct PDF links

inputs.target: a local URL-list file (JSONL objects with a url key, or bare PDF URLs)

purpose: acquire prose from a curated list of remote PDF URLs into the impostor pool (the grant_proposal / expert_affidavit population baselines); the generic PDF acquirer that per-source URL-list builders feed.
use_when: building the grant_proposal or expert_affidavit population baseline from a curated list of direct PDF URLs
